subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, transcending all mention and utterance, befitteth the most holy and exalted Court of that Desired One Who, from the Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و بیان ساحت امنع اقدس حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که از قلم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for forgiveness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
